But Kailin did a presentation a little while ago to show their whole story because she was just like a lot of you guys. Like she didn't start her business with thousands of dollars, millions of dollars. She started in an apartment with no, I mean, a mattress but that was about it and she showed you pictures of it through the presentation and like talks about how she got her idea and how it worked, how they plugged it together, how they did the training and how they built this company out that's helped serve over a million women. And I want you to watch that presentation. So a couple things that's going to do. Number one, same goal. It's going to increase your belief in this process. It worked for me. It worked for Brandon and Kailin. It's worked for hundreds and hundreds of other people and it's going to work for you as well. Listen to their story and it'll help increase your belief.
